metadata.name: Monitoring - High Latency on WAN Link

description: An RMM alert indicates high latency on the primary WAN link for a client's office.

nodes.task_description: Check the firewall's traffic graphs to see if the link is saturated.

expected_outcome.value: The technician finds that a user is downloading a very large file, consuming all available bandwidth.

nodes.task_description: Apply a temporary Quality of Service (QoS) policy to limit the bandwidth for that user's workstation, allowing critical traffic to function normally.

expected_outcome.value: The high latency issue is resolved by traffic shaping, and the alert clears.
